1_transitions.notes: 11 transitions rendered to output/_transition_test/, all 3 mode profiles working

2_real_footage.notes: module + CSV log shipped; verified-channel allowlist; 15s cap; live download not test-run; Visual Director integration deferred

3_expanded_stock.notes: utils/stock_fetcher.py wraps Pexels + Pixabay + Pixabay-AI parallel; video/generate_video.py delegates with legacy fallback. Coverr deferred (HTML scrape, brittle)

4_lottie_motion_gfx.notes: Pivoted to FFmpeg-native motion graphics — lottie pkg has no MP4/PNG-seq exporter. Ships lower_third / title_card / logo_reveal as MOV-with-alpha; composite() helper for overlay onto base video. Visual Director integration deferred to Step 10.

5_l_j_cuts.notes: Planner ships (utils/editorial_cuts.py); generates per-boundary cut_type + visual_offset. 60% L-cuts as brief specifies. Deep generate_video.py integration deferred to keep working pipeline intact.

6_beat_sync.notes: librosa beat detection + snap_to_nearest_beat with max_drift_s. Tested on ambient_tech.mp3 (117.5 BPM, 245 beats); 2/4 sample cuts snapped within 0.4s drift, others left alone.

7_lut_color_grading.notes: 3 looks (cinema_standard / news_network / documentary) as FFmpeg eq+curves chains. apply_lut3d() supports user-supplied .cube files. 3 preview MP4s rendered to output/_grade_test/.

8_speed_ramping.notes: Punch detector + ramp_segment() helper. Video-only (audio is narration, can't ramp). Found 'Read that again' hook in current latest.json. Demo render OK.

9_picture_in_picture.notes: Comparison detector (X vs Y, before/after) + side_by_side() with 50/50, 60/40, 40/60 layouts. Found 'Musk versus Altman' in latest.json. 60/40 sample render OK.

10_full_test_render.notes: Microsoft/OpenAI script written + rendered + color-graded. _v19_microsoft_openai_full_upgrade.mp4 = 66.5MB, 270s (4m30s), QC 9.3/10 APPROVED. Cost $0.94. Phase 19 features ACTIVELY USED: Step 3 (3 new clips from Pexels/Pixabay-AI) + Step 7 (cinema_standard color grade). NOT exercised in this render: transitions/motion graphics/L-cuts/beat sync/speed ramps/PiP — those are utility-shaped and deep generate_video.py integration is deferred. 6 sample frames in output/_v19_frames/.

decisions: Brian re-render rejected by user — will be superseded by Phase 19 test render
Test topic = Microsoft/OpenAI (not Anthropic) — fresh script, no prior baselines
